info.title: Sarbacane API
info.description: Sarbacane is a solution for managing, creating and sending email and SMS campaigns, as well as setting up intelligent, automated marketing workflows.

get.summary: Get groups related to a contact list

put.summary: Edit groups for a contact list

get.summary: Retrieve custom fields for a list

post.summary: Add a custom field to a list

delete.summary: Delete all custom fields from a list

post.summary: Add a single contact to a list

delete.summary: Remove a contact by email or phone

post.summary: Import a template for a campaign
Add HTML/text content to a campaign send
Import a contact list for a campaign

put.summary: Manage team sharing for a campaign

post.summary: List credits consumed by users or teams
Invite a user to the account

put.summary: Update user role or team assignment

headerAuth.name: apiKey
headerAuth.description: API key in header, paired with accountId header

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Manage custom fields for contact lists

tags.name: Blacklists
tags.description: Manage blacklists, bounces, unsubscribers, and complaints

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Create and manage email and SMS campaigns
